name: Fremont Indoor Golf
about: Fremont Indoor Golf is a golf simulation venue featuring four TruGolf E6 simulators with access to over 100 PGA golf courses. The facility operates on a walk-in basis with hourly rentals, allowing an unlimited number of golfers per bay. Located inside the Fremont River Deck, the venue provides a full bar and is open seven days a week, with some days potentially blacked out for private events. Pricing is straightforward at $25 per person per hour, with all taxes included and payment accepted via cash or major credit cards on-site.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient location in Fremont River Deck

food_and_drink.notes: Available from the full bar menu within the Fremont River Deck
Full bar with alcoholic beverages available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Four simulator bays equipped with TruGolf E6 technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers must bring their own clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as a full bar is available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes varies by player pace and course selection, but with no golfer limit per bay, groups can take as much time as needed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specify child policies or junior programs, so it's recommended to contact them directly for details on kid-friendliness.
